MarketingShell.description: AI Creative Operating System for ecommerce growth teams.
MarketingShell.cta_body: Explore the product story here, then move into the app when your team is ready to work.

Footer.description: Watchable helps ecommerce growth teams turn product and brand context into angles, storyboards, and ad-ready creative directions.

AboutPage.meta_description: Learn how Watchable approaches creative operations for ecommerce growth teams.
AboutPage.title: Watchable helps growth teams make better creative decisions, faster
AboutPage.body: We built Watchable to help ecommerce teams move from product and brand context to creative angles, storyboards, and ad-ready direction with more structure and less friction.
AboutPage.card_one_body: Start from product facts, audience nuance, and campaign intent before execution begins.
AboutPage.card_two_body: Turn ideas into storyboards, concepts, and creative direction the team can align on quickly.
AboutPage.card_three_body: Support fast iteration across launches, paid social, marketplaces, and ongoing testing.

PricingPage.meta_description: Watchable pricing should match your team structure, creative workflow, and production needs.
PricingPage.title: Pricing should reflect your creative workflow, team shape, and production needs
PricingPage.body: Watchable pricing should align with how your team sources product context, collaborates on creative direction, and moves approved ideas into production.
PricingPage.card_one_body: Choose a setup that fits your review process, production volume, and stakeholder needs.
PricingPage.card_two_body: Support product onboarding, creative operations setup, and rollout planning when needed.
PricingPage.card_three_body: Move interested teams into the app or a demo conversation without friction.
PricingPage.cta_body: Talk through your workflow, creative volume, and rollout needs with the Watchable team.

UseCasesPage.meta_description: Watchable supports ecommerce growth teams, beauty and skincare brands, and Amazon sellers.
UseCasesPage.title: Use cases for teams that need stronger creative systems
UseCasesPage.body: Watchable helps teams turn product context into creative direction that is easier to review, refine, and launch.

ecommerce_growth_teams.title: Ecommerce growth teams
ecommerce_growth_teams.body: Translate product and campaign context into more consistent creative operations.

beauty_skincare.title: Beauty and skincare
beauty_skincare.body: Handle nuanced product positioning and high-volume creative iteration with more structure.

amazon_sellers.title: Amazon sellers
amazon_sellers.body: Move from listing inputs to sharper ad direction without a fragmented workflow.

ecommerce_growth_teams.meta_description: How Watchable helps ecommerce growth teams turn product context into creative operating leverage.
ecommerce_growth_teams.title: Ecommerce growth teams
ecommerce_growth_teams.summary: Growth teams need a repeatable way to move from product context and campaign goals into usable creative direction.
ecommerce_growth_teams.one_body: Keep product facts, positioning, and creative intent aligned across the team.
ecommerce_growth_teams.two_body: Reduce the lag between product inputs and reviewable creative decisions.
ecommerce_growth_teams.three_body: Create a system that supports briefs, revisions, and consistent creative throughput.

beauty_skincare.meta_description: How Watchable helps beauty and skincare brands manage nuanced product storytelling and creative volume.
beauty_skincare.title: Beauty and skincare
beauty_skincare.summary: Beauty brands need creative systems that can handle nuance, visual consistency, and claim-sensitive messaging.
beauty_skincare.one_body: Support stronger creative ideas without drifting into careless product claims.
beauty_skincare.two_body: Reflect texture, routine, benefit framing, and audience sensitivity with more discipline.
beauty_skincare.three_body: Keep iteration moving without reducing the brand to generic creative.

amazon_sellers.meta_description: How Watchable helps Amazon sellers turn listing inputs into ad-ready creative direction.
amazon_sellers.title: Amazon sellers
amazon_sellers.summary: Amazon sellers often have product information but not a clean system for turning it into stronger creative direction.
amazon_sellers.one_body: Start from the product detail page and associated assets instead of rebuilding context manually.
amazon_sellers.two_body: Turn marketplace inputs into clearer hooks, angles, and production priorities.
amazon_sellers.three_body: Keep sourcing, interpretation, and creative planning closer together.

DemoRequestPage.meta_description: Request a Watchable demo for your ecommerce growth team.
DemoRequestPage.title: Book a closer look at the Watchable workflow
DemoRequestPage.body: Use this route when your team wants to see how Watchable turns product context into creative direction and production-ready outputs.
DemoRequestPage.card_one_body: See how Watchable fits your creative planning, review, and launch process.
DemoRequestPage.card_two_body: Give growth, brand, and creative leads a shared view of the product.
DemoRequestPage.card_three_body: Move into the app or continue with a guided rollout conversation.
